segments.original_text: ジャストシールド下強を食らわし

segments.text: Oh, but they don't fall off here!
segments.original_text: おっとここは落ちきらなかったが

segments.text: They're not securing the ledge advantage
segments.original_text: 崖展開を奪えていません

full_text: Parry into down tilt! Down tilt connects! Oh, but they don't fall off here! They're not securing the ledge advantage Can they seal it? On the approach...

corrections.original: ジャスシールド下強を食い残し
corrections.corrected: ジャストシールド下強を食らわし
corrections.rule: Smash term: ジャスシールド→ジャストシールド; 食い残し→食らわし
Garbled transcription: 食い残し→食らわし
